_comment: Prompt Ledger. Store or link major reusable prompts. Use 'body' for an inline copyable prompt, or 'link' for a path/URL. Keep bodies short; link out to docs for long ones.

items.title: Mission Control kickoff
items.purpose: The prompt that created this dashboard — reuse to extend or rebuild Mission Control.
items.body: Build a gated /lab/mission-control operations dashboard for Devbiz. Sections: Owner Action Queue (first), Active Project Lanes, Active PR Board, Agent Registry (reported status only), Decision Log, Prompt Ledger, Agent Reporting Protocol. Render from data/*.json so future agents update the registry, not the UI. Keep zero-build/static, dark-theme, mobile-usable, honest labels (reported/manual/unknown). One PR lane only.

items.title: Aether Wing Phase 1 kickoff
items.purpose: Start the first playable slice once the frontier-al folder/repo is confirmed.
items.body: PRECONDITION: owner has confirmed the frontier-al folder/repo. Build Aether Wing Phase 1 as a playable slice in the frontier-al Vite/TypeScript/Three.js scaffold (NOT in Devbiz). No wallet/blockchain/account systems. Deliver: one PR lane, a verifiable slice with active-play screenshots, and a closeout (Asked/Done/Needs you). Devbiz only keeps the gated placeholder route.

items.title: Agent closeout format
items.purpose: The required closeout every agent ends with.
items.body:
Asked:
Done:
Needs you:

If anything requires the owner, lead with:
Owner action now:
(then exactly what to click, test, approve, or merge)

items.title: Future agent reporting protocol
items.purpose: The full reporting contract all future agents must follow. Rendered in the Agent Reporting Protocol section below with a copyable template.
items.body: See the Agent Reporting Protocol section on this page — copy the template there.
